========================================================================
 cp233 E119Q dead-seat — 3 sequences for AlphaFold3 (alphafoldserver.com)
========================================================================
HOW TO RUN ON AF3 (do all 3; each is one single-chain protein):
  1. Go to https://alphafoldserver.com  -> "Add entity" -> type = Protein.
  2. Paste ONE sequence below into the sequence box. Copies = 1. (No DNA/no extra chains.)
  3. (BASIC run) leave it protein-only -> "Continue and preview job" -> Run.
  4. (FUNCTIONAL run, optional but this is the real test) ALSO add ligands:
       "Add entity" -> Ligand -> ATP  (copies 5) ;  "Add entity" -> Ion -> MG (copies 5).
     This puts ATP.Mg in the 5 catalytic pockets so we can see if the dead seat
     locally breaks the Mg/water geometry.
  5. Name each job (below) so we can tell them apart. Download the 5 models each.
Run order if limited: WT first (baseline), then E119Q_1seat, then E119Q_5seat.
Note: I'm ALSO folding these on GPU (Boltz, tiled MSA) to save you time — see chat.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
JOB 1  name: cp233_WT   (baseline — should stay closed, 5/5)
------------------------------------------------------------------------


------------------------------------------------------------------------
JOB 2  name: cp233_E119Q_1seat   (dead seat in copy 1 only; pos 228 E->Q)
------------------------------------------------------------------------


------------------------------------------------------------------------
JOB 3  name: cp233_E119Q_5seat   (all 5 Walker-B Glu -> Gln; full knockout)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
